data.title: Elderly Couple Duped Into 'Helping' Investigation in $1.3 Million Bitcoin ATM Scam
data.description:

source: https://www.benzinga.com/crypto/cryptocurrency/26/01/49830695/elderly-couple-duped-into-helping-investigation-in-1-3-million-bitcoin-atm-scam?utm_source=cryptopanic.com&utm_campaign=partner_feed&utm_medium=referral

data.description:

data.title: How 1% of Gold’s Market Could Be Enough to Rewrite Bitcoin’s Valuation
data.description:
A new chart shared by Bitwise illustrates how even a small rotation of capital from gold into Bitcoin could have an outsized impact on BTC’s price, highlighting the asymmetry between the two markets. What the Chart Shows The visualization models hypothetical Bitcoin prices based on different percentages of global gold market capitalization rotating into BTC.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/how-1-of-golds-market-could-be-enough-to-rewrite-bitcoins-valuation/

data.title: Truebit Hacker Transfers 4000.9 ETH to Anonymous Address
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, data from Arkham indicates that at 03:51, a total of 4000.9 ETH was transferred from the Truebit Hacker to an anonymous address beginning with 0xD841.

data.title: Malaysian authorities seize 41 crypto mining rigs in local raid
data.description:
Malaysian police conducted three raids tied to illegal cryptocurrency mining and seized 41 machines used for the activity. The police are working to trace the ownership of the machines confiscated in Teluk Intan and identify the people running the operations. Authorities warn the public that illegal crypto mining is a criminal offense that poses safety […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/malaysia-seize-crypto-mining-rigs/

data.title: Musk’s SpaceX get green light to fire 7,500 new Starlink satellites into orbit
data.description:
The Federal Communications Commission has granted SpaceX permission to launch an additional 7,500 second-generation Starlink satellites, bringing the total number of the company’s authorized satellites to 15,000 units. Only half of SpaceX’s proposed 30,000 satellites were approved for deployment by the Federal Communications Commission (FCC). SpaceX must deploy half of the satellites authorized by the […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/musk-spacex-starlink-satellites-into-orbit/

data.title: Tim Beiko to focus on ‘frontier use cases’ as Ethereum Foundation shuffles leadership
data.description:
In an announcement posted on X, Tim Beiko, one of the more recognizable names in the Ethereum Foundation and a contributor to core protocol development, has announced his transition from Layer 1 research and development. Beiko clarified that he would remain at the foundation but shift to an advisory role within the Protocol team while […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/beiko-ethereum-foundation-shuffle-leadership/

data.title: Binance Smart Chain Revenue Hits New High as On-Chain Activity Surges
data.description:
Binance Smart Chain has recorded its strongest revenue day in recent months, breaking a prior on-chain fee record as user activity accelerated sharply. Data shared by CryptoQuant shows daily blockchain revenue on BSC spiking to new highs, signaling a notable increase in real economic usage rather than price-driven noise.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/binance-smart-chain-revenue-hits-new-high-as-on-chain-activity-surges/

data.title: Chinese tech leaders say gap with America can be bridged despite constraints
data.description:
China can close the technology gap with America, driven by more risk-taking and fresh ideas, but the country still lacks the advanced equipment needed to make cutting-edge chips. That’s what leading Chinese AI researchers said Saturday. Two big Chinese AI startups, MiniMax and Zhipu AI, had strong debuts on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange this […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/chinese-tech-leaders-to-bridge-gap-america/

data.description:

data.title: Bessent Says Treasury Has Funds To repay Tariff Refunds
data.description:
Secretary Scott Bessent stated that the Treasury has more than sufficient funds to pay any tariff refunds ordered if the Supreme Court rules against President Trump's emergency tariffs.
source: https://catenaa.com/markets/special-reports/bessent-says-treasury-has-funds-to-repay-tariff-refunds/

data.title: Polymarket faces first state-level cease-and-desist from Tennessee, weeks after US relaunch: report
data.description:
Tennessee's Sports Wagering Council sent cease-and-desist letters to Kalshi, Polymarket, and Crypto. com threatening potential criminal prosecution.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/385002/polymarket-faces-first-state-level-cease-and-desist-from-tennessee-weeks-after-us-relaunch-report?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss
